column1: # Real-music bench corpus. All entries are explicitly Creative Commons or
# public domain on archive.org. fetch_corpus.sh resolves each URL with
# yt-dlp + ffmpeg and caches a 30-s f32le @ 22050 Hz mono clip.
# Add more entries by appending lines below. Format: TAB-separated.
# Why TSV, not CSV: track titles routinely contain commas and quotes.
